series_metadata.series_description: All information collected on potential employees. Includes but is not limited to drug tests, credit reports, and criminal background checks.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Non-hired candidates - retain for five years. Hired candidates - retain for 50 years following employee''s separation. ; Paper: Non-hired candidates - retain for five years. Hired candidates, retain for two years following separation, then convert to machine readable and retain for 50 years following employee''s separation., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
